allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(r[''''id''''], r[''''category''''], r[''''title'''']\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('C:\\Users\\Jordon\\Desktop\\Resume Edit.docx'\)
\\$entry = \\$zip.GetEntry\('word/document.xml'\)
\\$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\(\\$entry.Open\(\)\)
\\$content = \\$reader.ReadToEnd\(\)
\\$reader.Close\(\)
\\$zip.Dispose\(\)
\\$content | Out-File 'C:\\Users\\Jordon\\Desktop\\resume_doc.xml' -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host 'Done'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('C:\\Users\\Jordon\\Desktop\\Resume Edit.docx'\)
\\$entry = \\$zip.GetEntry\('word/document.xml'\)
\\$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\(\\$entry.Open\(\)\)
\\$content = \\$reader.ReadToEnd\(\)
\\$reader.Close\(\)
\\$zip.Dispose\(\)
\\$idx = \\$content.IndexOf\('Architected'\)
Write-Host 'idx:' \\$idx
\\$content.Substring\(\\$idx, 800\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive] | Out-Null
Write-Host 'ZipArchive available'
" 2>&1)
